description: The AttribList class holds a list of attribute values that come from a POP. The attribute values are `floats`, `ints` or `tuples` of `floats` or `ints`.

members.name: name
members.description: The name of the attribute this list contains.

members.name: owner
members.description: The node this attribute came from.

methods.name: len
methods.description: Returns the total number of values.
Get a specific attribute value given an integer index.
